chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-700 of 2022. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 02.09.2022. Mr. Mumtaz Sachal Awan advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Aziz Ahmed Laghari advocate for applicant. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh. Applicant is present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. ORDER MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- During patrolling on 08.06.2022 police party of P.S. Pangrio spotted two persons near Pir Hamid Shah Link road near stop village Ali Nawaz Khoso with 50 packets of Safina Gutka, duly recovered. They could arrest only co-accused Wazir Ali whereas applicant namely Rajjab Ali is said to have made his escape good from spot. His name was disclosed by co-accused. Except that there is no material available against him. His counsel is absent and I have heard him and the counsel holding brief on his behalf. Learned APG has opposed bail however has failed to show any criminal record against applicant or any other material except disclosure made by co-accused of his name. Accordingly, this bail application is allowed and ad-interim pre- arrest bail granted to the applicant vide order 01.07.2022 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE Irfan Ali
